backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor for the Raj Empire Esports platform, defining data types and CRUD operations for user profiles, tournaments, registrations, support tickets, OTPs, social links, and terms, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state to the new schema by adding a `youtubeUrl` field to tournaments and replacing a single `adminPrincipal` with an `adminPrincipals` map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: updating the Admin Dashboard to use admin-authenticated actors for platform-wide queries, and adding Room ID, Room Password, and YouTube URL fields to the tournament management UI.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, loading Google Fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron, Saira Condensed) and mounting the app via the `/src/main.tsx` module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (public, player-protected, and admin-protected), wraps the tree with QueryClientProvider, AuthProvider, and AdminAuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminProtectedRo: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated admin users to `/admin` by checking `isAdminAuthenticated` from AdminAuthContext.
frontend/src/components/AuthMethodButton: Renders a row of social/auth method buttons (Google, Apple, Microsoft, Passkey) with icons, or a loading spinner state, used for authentication method selection.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying brand info, quick navigation links, and dynamic social media links (YouTube, Instagram, Telegram) fetched via a query hook.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, and conditional auth controls (login/register or dashboard/logout) based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that composes Header, Footer, and a router Outlet for page content in a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/PaymentModal.tsx: Modal dialog for joining a tournament by spending in-app coins, showing wallet balance, entry fee, and handling the registration mutation with success/error states.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the login page and renders children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/context/AdminAuthContext.ts: React context providing admin authentication state persisted in localStorage, with login/logout actions and legacy compatibility aliases.
frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx: React context managing player session state (mobile, displayName, bgmiPlayerId) persisted in localStorage, with login and logout helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend canister interactions including tournaments, registrations, payment proofs, withdrawals, support tickets, social links, and user profiles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, and defines brand-specific utilities like gradients and scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with a collapsible sidebar for navigating between management sections (tournaments, registrations, players, payments, withdrawals, support, etc.) and uses various query hooks to display and mutate backend data.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Two-phase admin login page with hardcoded credentials for each phase; on successful completion of both phases it calls `adminLogin()` and redirects to the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Player dashboard page with a responsive sidebar for navigating profile, tournaments, wallet, withdrawals, and support sections, using query hooks to fetch and display user-specific data.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for Raj Empire Esports Arena featuring a hero section with CTA buttons to view tournaments or register, and a features grid highlighting daily tournaments, mega events, team modes, and fair play.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, fetches their profile from the canister actor, and redirects to the player dashboard on success or shows an error if no account is found.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Multi-step registration page that collects display name, mobile number, and BGMI Player ID, then authenticates via Internet Identity and calls the canister to create and save the player profile.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Terms and Conditions page that fetches content from the backend (falling back to hardcoded text), parses numbered sections, and renders them with styled headings and alternating border colors.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentsPage.tsx: Tournaments listing page with search and status filter controls that displays all BGMI tournaments as cards and opens a PaymentModal for registration, redirecting unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, brand colors/gradients, shadows, border radii, and accordion animations for the frontend.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for the Raj Empire Esports platform, documenting existing features, known issues (admin authorization errors, blank admin panel sections), and pending fix requests for bidirectional data sync and admin authorization.
